intel_overview.headline_zh: UPC调解落地与EPO数字化加速
intel_overview.headline_en: UPC Mediation Launches, EPO Digital Shift Accelerates
intel_overview.summary_zh: 欧洲IP生态正经历结构性重塑。统一专利法院（UPC）调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）正式运行，标志着替代性争议解决机制成为维权新选项。欧洲专利局（EPO）全面推行DOCX格式及无纸化流程，并吸纳摩尔多瓦为第40个成员国，显著提升行政效率与覆盖范围。司法层面，欧盟法院在商标声誉评估、AI版权报酬及数据合规上确立严格标准，强调实质损害填补与价值观对齐。整体态势显示，欧洲IP体系正向更高效、数字化且规则严明的方向演进。
top_signals: UPC-PMAC调解系统上线，提供SEP及专利纠纷非诉解决路径
EPO全面开放DOCX提交并计划2027年默认无纸化，流程数字化提速
摩尔多瓦加入EPO，欧洲专利保护版图扩展至第40国
欧盟法院裁定在线新闻出版者获公平报酬权，平衡平台与版权利益
cross_currents: 争议解决多元化：UPC诉讼高压下，PMAC调解成为降低维权成本、快速解决SEP纠纷的战略补充
审查标准趋同与数字化并行：EPO通过实践趋同周期统一宽泛权利要求审查，同时以AI和DOCX提升处理效能
合规边界收紧：从商标虚构历史到AI高风险分类，司法与立法双重强化对误导性宣传及技术伦理的监管
implications: 中国企业应评估利用PMAC调解机制处理欧洲专利侵权及SEP许可谈判，以降低诉讼风险与成本
需立即适配EPO DOCX提交流程，优化专利申请文件结构，避免因格式转换错误导致的新增主题风险
在欧品牌营销需审慎使用历史年份及名人姓名，避免触犯商标描述性或欺骗性驳回条款，确保证据链完整

report_items.title_zh: 智能球门、护腿板及捡球机器人：DPMA更新足球技术画廊
report_items.title_en: DPMA Expands Football and Technology Gallery for 2026 World Cup
report_items.title: Smarte Tore, intelligente Schienbeinschoner und Roboter, die Bälle sammeln
report_items.summary_zh: 德国专利商标局（DPMA）借2026年美加墨世界杯之机，扩展其“足球与技术”在线画廊。该画廊收录了全球范围内过去125年间与足球相关的专利文献，涵盖门线技术、视频助理裁判、生物数据监测传感器及AI驱动设备等创新。DPMA旨在通过展示这些发明，强调知识产权保护在挖掘足球领域经济潜力中的重要作用。
report_items.summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) has expanded its online gallery, Football and Technology, to coincide with the 2026 FIFA World Cup in Canada, Mexico, and the USA. The updated collection features patent documents spanning 125 years of innovation, ranging from early mechanical equipment like screw-in studs to modern digital solutions. New additions include AI-controlled safety nets, ball-collecting robots, smart goals, and intelligent shin guards. The gallery also details established technologies such as goal-line technology and video assistant refereeing. DPMA President Eva Schew...
core_points_zh: DPMA为配合2026年世界杯，更新了展示全球足球相关专利的在线画廊
展出内容涵盖从传统机械装备到AI、机器人及生物数据监测等现代技术创新
DPMA主席指出，该画廊证实专利保护是利用足球发明经济潜力的重要工具
core_points_en: DPMA updates its online gallery with recent patents including AI-driven safety nets and robotics.
The collection covers 125 years of football innovations, from mechanical gear to digital tech.
The initiative highlights the role of IP protection in maximizing the economic value of sports inventions.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，德国后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This update serves primarily as a public awareness initiative rather than a legal precedent. For rights holders, it underscores the DPMA’s view of IP as a key driver for commercializing sports technology. Practitioners may find value in reviewing how the office categorizes emerging fields like wearable sensors and AI-assisted officiating within historical patent contexts.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Demonstrates the DPMA's strategic emphasis on IP as a tool for commercializing sports-related innovations and protecting R&D investments.
Practice note: The gallery offers a structured view of how mechanical and digital football technologies are documented, aiding prior art searches in sports equipment sectors.
What to monitor: Observe if future updates include detailed case studies on the patentability boundaries of AI-driven officiating or real-time biometric data processing.

report_items.title_zh: 如何在欧洲专利局提起异议
report_items.title_en: Procedural Guide to Filing Oppositions at the European Patent Office
report_items.title: How To File An Opposition At The European Patent Office (EPO)
report_items.summary_zh: 本文介绍向欧洲专利局提起专利异议的程序。异议须书面或电子提交并缴费，仅限依据《欧洲专利公约》第100条规定的理由，包括缺乏可专利性、公开不充分及新增主题。明确排除清晰度、单一性等非独立异议理由。
report_items.summary_en: This guidance outlines the procedural requirements for filing oppositions against granted European patents at the EPO. Opponents must submit a notice in writing or electronically via Online Filing 2.0, ensuring the official fee is paid simultaneously. Challenges are strictly limited to grounds under Article 100 EPC: lack of patentability, insufficient disclosure, or added subject matter. The text clarifies that exclusions such as mathematical methods or medical treatments fall under patentability checks. It emphasizes that each ground must be clearly identified during filing, reinforcing that...
core_points_zh: 异议须向欧洲专利局书面或电子提交，并在提交时缴纳官方费用
异议理由限于公约第100条：缺乏可专利性、公开不充分或新增主题
清晰度、单一性或优先权无效等问题不得作为独立异议理由提出
core_points_en: Opposition notices must be filed in writing or electronically with the official fee paid at submission.
Valid challenges are restricted to Article 100 EPC grounds: patentability, disclosure sufficiency, or added matter.
Patentability grounds include lack of novelty, inventive step, or excluded subject matter like medical methods.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This overview reinforces the strict statutory limits of EPO opposition proceedings. Practitioners must ensure arguments align exclusively with Article 100 EPC grounds, avoiding inadmissible issues like clarity. Proper fee payment and clear ground identification are critical procedural steps to maintain admissibility and effectively challenge patent validity in Europe.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Understanding the narrow scope of allowable opposition grounds helps rights holders assess the viability of challenging competitor patents.
Practice note: Ensure opposition fees are paid upon filing and that arguments strictly adhere to Article 100 EPC to avoid inadmissibility.
What to monitor: Track EPO updates to Online Filing 2.0 and any evolving case law interpreting Article 100 grounds for sufficient disclosure.

report_items.title_zh: EUIPO大上诉委员会拒绝注册“GEORGE ORWELL”商标
report_items.title_en: EUIPO Grand Board Refuses GEORGE ORWELL Trademark for Content-Related Goods
report_items.title: The Price Of Literary Fame – EUIPO Grand Board Refuses Registration Of “GEORGE ORWELL” As A Trademark
report_items.summary_zh: 2025年12月19日，EUIPO大上诉委员会裁定，“GEORGE ORWELL”文字商标不得在书籍、电影及相关娱乐教育服务上注册为欧盟商标。委员会认定，相关公众会将该名称视为描述商品内容或主题，而非商业来源指示，因此依据《欧盟商标条例》第7(1)(c)条以缺乏显著性/具有描述性为由驳回申请。
report_items.summary_en: The EUIPO Grand Board of Appeal refused registration of the word mark GEORGE ORWELL for books, films, and educational services. In decision R 2248/2019-G, the Board ruled that the relevant public perceives the name as describing the subject matter or content of the goods, rather than indicating commercial origin. Consequently, the mark was rejected under Article 7(1)(c) of the EU Trade Mark Regulation for lack of distinctiveness due to descriptiveness. This ruling clarifies that famous persons’ names may be deemed descriptive when applied to content-oriented products, establishing that such si...
core_points_zh: EUIPO大上诉委员会拒绝“GEORGE ORWELL”在书籍及娱乐服务上的欧盟商标注册
裁定认定名人姓名可被公众视为描述商品内容或主题，而非商业来源指示
确认“内容/主题”属于欧盟商标条例第7(1)(c)条下描述性的认可子类别
core_points_en: Grand Board confirms subject matter is a recognized subcategory of descriptiveness under Article 7(1)(c).
Famous names describing content rather than origin are unregistrable for books and media.
Decision resolves diverging Office practices regarding registrability of well-known persons’ names.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案澄清了名人姓名在内容导向型商品上的可注册性标准。若姓名被公众感知为描述内容而非来源，将因描述性被驳回。企业在申请含名人姓名的商标时，需评估其在特定类别中是否仅起内容指示作用，避免触犯绝对驳回理由。
report_items.insight_en: This decision establishes that famous names used on content-driven goods may be refused as descriptive. Rights holders should anticipate higher scrutiny for personal names in publishing and entertainment classes. Applicants must demonstrate that the sign functions primarily as a brand identifier, not merely as a topic indicator, to overcome absolute grounds for refusal in these sectors.
insight_points_zh: 名人姓名在书籍、影音等内容类产品上易被认定为描述性标志
需区分姓名作为来源标识与作为内容主题指示的不同法律后果
后续应关注EUIPO对其他类似名人姓名商标申请的审查尺度一致性
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Names of famous figures face heightened refusal risks for books, films, and educational services where the name signals content topic.
Practice note: Evidence must prove the mark indicates commercial origin, countering the presumption that the name describes the work’s subject matter.
What to monitor: Future EUIPO examinations of other historical or literary figures’ names for similar content-oriented goods and services.

report_items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭准许口头听证使用英语的裁定
report_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Permits English Oral Pleadings Despite French Language of Proceedings
report_items.title: CoA, May 15, 2026, Order On Request For Use Of English At Oral Hearing, UPC-CoA-50/2026
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭在Robert Bosch诉Valeo案中作出裁定，尽管法语为案件程序语言，但鉴于上诉人代表法语口语能力不足且被上诉人同意，法院基于程序效率与公平原则，准许双方在2026年5月26日的口头听证中使用英语进行辩论。法院引用先例及程序规则前言作为法律依据，强调灵活性与成本效益，未正式变更案件语言。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal authorized oral pleadings in English for a hearing where French remained the formal language of proceedings. The decision addressed an appellant’s representative who understood French but lacked sufficient oral proficiency for effective advocacy. The court prioritized procedural efficiency and fairness, noting that direct English advocacy was superior to using an interpreter. Crucially, the respondent consented to the request, which strengthened the application. The court relied on the Rules of Procedure Preamble’s principles of flexibility and cost-effectiveness, citin...
core_points_zh: 法院基于程序规则前言的灵活性原则，准许在非程序语言的口头听证中使用英语
被上诉人的同意显著增强了变更听证语言的请求效力，使附属请求变得不必要
法院参考了涉及相同当事人的先前程序裁定，将其作为支持当前决定的说服性先例
core_points_en: The Court permitted English oral pleadings while retaining French as the formal language of proceedings based on pragmatic efficiency considerations.
Respondent consent to the language request significantly strengthened the application, rendering subsidiary requests for partial English use unnecessary.
The Court cited the Rules of Procedure Preamble and prior orders involving the same parties as the legal basis for this flexible approach.
report_items.insight_zh: 该裁定确立了UPC上诉庭在特定条件下允许庭审语言与程序语言分离的实务操作。当事人可通过证明语言障碍、获得对方同意并援引效率原则，申请使用更熟练的语言进行口头辩论。这为跨国诉讼中的语言策略提供了灵活性，同时强调了双方合意对程序决定的关键影响。
report_items.insight_en: This order highlights the UPC’s willingness to decouple the language of oral hearings from the formal language of proceedings to ensure effective representation. It demonstrates that party consensus on procedural logistics can drive judicial discretion, particularly when supported by principles of efficiency. Practitioners should note that prior procedural history between identical parties may influence subsequent ca...
insight_points_zh: 程序语言与庭审口语可分离，需证明语言能力不足及对方同意
程序规则前言中的效率与公平原则是法院行使裁量权的主要依据
相同当事人间的先前程序裁定可作为后续程序决定的重要参考因素
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Parties facing language proficiency gaps can seek oral hearing adjustments without formally changing the case language, provided opposing counsel consents.
Practice note: Citing the Rules of Procedure Preamble on efficiency and referencing prior procedural orders between the same parties strengthens requests for flexible hearing arra…
What to monitor: Whether the Court of Appeal continues to treat party alignment on procedural matters as a decisive factor in granting language accommodations.

report_items.title_zh: 统一专利法院初步异议：管辖权与实体问题的明确界限
report_items.title_en: UPC Preliminary Objections: Strict Boundary Between Jurisdiction and Substance
report_items.title: Preliminary Objections Before The UPC: A Clear Boundary Between Jurisdiction And Substance
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析统一专利法院在REEL International诉Fives ECL案中的裁定。法院依据《程序规则》第19.1条，驳回被告基于诉讼利益和德国判决既判力提出的初步异议。法院明确初步异议仅限管辖权、分庭管辖权及语言三类情形，其他实体争议应合并审理以符合程序经济原则。
report_items.summary_en: In a dispute between REEL International and Fives ECL, the Unified Patent Court rejected a defendant’s preliminary objection based on lack of interest to sue and res judicata from German proceedings. Relying on Rule 19.1 of the Rules of Procedure, the Court clarified that preliminary objections are strictly limited to challenges regarding court jurisdiction, division competence, or language of proceedings. The Court held that issues such as standing and res judicata require substantive examination of facts and evidence, rather than serving as procedural filters. This decision reinforces a clea...
core_points_zh: UPC程序规则限定初步异议仅适用于管辖权、分庭管辖权及诉讼语言三类情形
诉讼利益及既判力抗辩不属初步异议范围，需结合事实证据进行实体审查
法院拒绝分离审理或中间命令请求，主张单次听证以提升效率并实现一年内结案
core_points_en: Rule 19.1 limits preliminary objections exclusively to jurisdiction, division competence, and language issues.
Claims regarding interest to sue and res judicata fall outside the scope of preliminary objections.
Substantive defenses require full factual examination and cannot be resolved via procedural dismissal.
report_items.insight_zh: UPC通过严格界定初步异议范围，防止程序碎片化，强调诉讼经济与快速裁决。当事人需注意管辖权异议与实体抗辩的程序分流，避免试图通过初步异议拖延实体审理。此裁判思路有助于确立UPC高效审理的司法惯例。
report_items.insight_en: This ruling confirms the UPC’s commitment to procedural efficiency by preventing the fragmentation of cases through broad preliminary objections. Practitioners should note that defenses like res judicata will be addressed during merits proceedings, not as threshold jurisdictional bars. This approach reduces delays but requires parties to prepare comprehensive factual arguments early in the litigation process.
insight_points_zh: 明确初步异议的封闭列表性质，排除诉讼利益等实体前置抗辩
确立合并审理原则，拒绝将既判力等问题从实体审理中剥离
观察UPC后续案件是否持续贯彻这一效率优先的程序管理逻辑
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Expect faster initial jurisdictional rulings, but anticipate that substantive defenses like res judicata will proceed to full trial rather than causing early dis…
Practice note: Do not rely on Rule 19.1 for non-jurisdictional defenses; prepare detailed factual evidence for merits hearings instead of seeking procedural shortcuts.
What to monitor: Future UPC case law to confirm if this strict interpretation of Rule 19.1 remains consistent across different divisions and fact patterns.

report_items.title_en: CRISPR-Cas9 in Europe: Current Patent Landscape and Future Outlook
report_items.title: CRISPR‑Cas9 in Europe: the Current Situation and What Comes Next
report_items.summary_zh: 原文仅提供标题及摘要片段，指出CRISPR/Cas9技术引发复杂专利战。2012至2013年间多方申请导致权利重叠，形成两大主要竞争阵营。因正文缺失，无法提供具体法律状态或后续走向的详细事实。
report_items.summary_en: The emergence of CRISPR-Cas9 technology has triggered one of the most complex patent disputes in recent history. Initial filings by multiple groups between 2012 and 2013 resulted in overlapping claims, leading to prolonged legal conflicts over rights. Two primary rival camps have dominated this landscape. This analysis reviews the current status of these European patent battles and outlines potential future developments for stakeholders monitoring this high-stakes biotechnology sector.
core_points_zh: CRISPR/Cas9技术引发近年最复杂的专利纠纷之一
年多方申请导致权利要求重叠及长期法律争端
争端中形成了两个主要的对立竞争阵营
core_points_en: CRISPR-Cas9 discovery sparked complex patent battles due to overlapping filings from 2012 to 2013.
Two principal rival camps emerged as key competitors in the struggle for patent rights.
Years of legal wrangling have defined the current European landscape for this biotechnology platform.
report_items.insight_zh: 鉴于原文仅为导语片段，缺乏具体案件进展、法院裁决或欧洲专利局审查动态等实质内容。目前仅能确认该技术在欧洲存在长期的权属争议背景，需等待全文发布以获取关于“当前状况”及“未来走向”的具体法律分析或实务建议。
report_items.insight_en: Given the limited source text, specific legal outcomes or procedural updates are not detailed. However, the historical context of overlapping claims remains critical for rights holders. Stakeholders should recognize that the European patent environment for CRISPR-Cas9 is still shaped by these foundational disputes. Monitoring the resolution of conflicts between the two main rival camps is essential for understanding...
insight_points_zh: 原文未提供具体的专利有效性或侵权判定结论
需关注后续全文是否披露欧洲专利局或法院的最新动态
目前仅能确认存在两大竞争阵营的历史背景事实
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders must account for the legacy of overlapping 2012-2013 filings when assessing portfolio strength in Europe.
Practice note: The existence of two dominant rival camps suggests continued complexity in interpreting claim scope and validity.
What to monitor: Future publications should be tracked for specific updates on European Patent Office decisions or court rulings affecting these rival groups.

report_items.title: How To Plan Successful IP Mediation

report_items.summary_en: Mediation offers faster, confidential, and commercially focused resolutions for intellectual property disputes compared to litigation. The World Intellectual Property Organization Arbitration and Mediation Center reported a forty-two percent case increase in 2025, with small and medium-sized enterprises comprising fifty-nine percent of parties. In the European Union, the EUIPO Mediation Centre expanded its services in June 2025 to cover all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and designs. Furthermore, the Unified Patent Court’s Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre is scheduled to ina...
core_points_zh: EUIPO调解中心服务于2025年6月扩展，覆盖所有欧盟商标和注册设计的双方程序
统一专利法院专利调解与仲裁中心定于2026年6月成立，提供欧洲替代性争议解决论坛
WIPO数据显示2025年案件量增42%，其中中小企业和个人当事人占比达59%
core_points_en: WIPO AMC cases rose forty-two percent in 2025, with SMEs and individuals accounting for fifty-nine percent of involved parties.
EUIPO Mediation Centre services expanded in June 2025 to include all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and registered designs.
The Unified Patent Court Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre will launch in June 2026 as a new European ADR forum.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: The expansion of institutional mediation frameworks at EUIPO and the upcoming UPC center signals a strategic shift toward non-adversarial dispute resolution in Europe. Rights holders should evaluate these mechanisms for cross-border conflicts where confidentiality and preserving commercial relationships are prioritized over public judicial precedents. The high participation of SMEs in WIPO cases suggests mediation is...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Mediation provides confidential, commercially oriented solutions for multi-jurisdictional IP disputes, particularly valuable for SMEs and entities seeking to pre…
Practice note: Counsel should assess the expanded EUIPO mediation scope for trademark and design oppositions, and prepare for the UPC Center's June 2026 launch for patent-related…
What to monitor: Track procedural rules and adoption rates of the new UPC Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre following its inauguration in June 2026.

report_items.title_zh: EPO成功完成ISO监督审核
report_items.title_en: EPO Maintains ISO Certifications Following Successful Surveillance Audit
report_items.title: EPO successfully completes ISO surveillance audit
report_items.summary_zh: 2026年4月，欧洲专利局（EPO）顺利通过外部审计机构的管理体系ISO监督审核。此次审核确认了EPO在质量管理、职业健康安全、信息安全和环境管理方面的稳健性，维持了其ISO 9001、ISO 45001、ISO 27001及ISO 14001认证。这体现了EPO对国际标准及合规性的承诺，并通过综合管理体系支持高质量服务交付。
report_items.summary_en: In April 2026, the European Patent Office (EPO) successfully completed its periodic ISO surveillance audit conducted by external auditors. The review confirmed the continued robustness and maturity of the EPO’s integrated management systems, allowing the organization to maintain its certifications for quality management (ISO 9001), occupational health and safety (ISO 45001), information security (ISO 27001), and environmental management (ISO 14001). This outcome underscores the EPO’s adherence to international standards and regulatory compliance. By aligning policies, processes, and controls w...
core_points_zh: EPO于2026年4月通过外部审计机构的ISO管理体系监督审核
维持ISO 9001、45001、27001及14001四项国际认证，确认体系成熟稳健
通过综合管理体系整合政策流程，确保持续改进及服务交付质量
core_points_en: The EPO passed its April 2026 external ISO surveillance audit, confirming ongoing adherence to international management standards.
Certifications maintained include ISO 9001 for quality, ISO 27001 for information security, ISO 45001 for safety, and ISO 14001 for environment.
The EPO utilizes an Integrated Management System to unify policies and controls, supporting service quality and continuous operational improvement.
report_items.insight_zh: 此新闻属于EPO内部行政与合规动态，不直接改变专利实体法或审查标准。实务中需关注其信息安全（ISO 27001）与质量管理（ISO 9001）的持续合规，这间接保障了电子提交系统及审查流程的稳定性与数据安全性，是评估EPO服务可靠性的基础指标。
report_items.insight_en: This update confirms the administrative and operational stability of the EPO rather than introducing changes to substantive patent law or examination guidelines. For rights holders and legal practitioners, the maintenance of ISO 27001 and ISO 9001 certifications serves as a key indicator of the reliability and data security standards underpinning the EPO’s electronic filing systems and procedural workflows. While thi...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性: EPO运营稳定性与数据安全合规性保障
Practice note/实务观察: 关注EPO管理体系认证状态对服务连续性的影响
What to monitor/后续观察: 无具体法律变动，仅需知悉机构合规状态更新
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Confirms the stability and data security compliance of EPO operations, indirectly supporting the reliability of electronic submission channels and case processin…
Practice note: Monitor the status of EPO management system certifications as baseline indicators for service continuity and operational maturity.
What to monitor: No immediate legal or procedural changes; treat as routine compliance confirmation regarding institutional operational standards.

report_items.title_zh: UPC替代性争议解决：仲裁、调解与专家裁决
report_items.title_en: UPC ADR Mechanisms: Scope of PMAC Arbitration, Mediation and Expert Determination
report_items.title: UPC ADR: Arbitration, Mediation And Expert Determination
report_items.summary_zh: 专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）作为统一专利法院（UPC）的一部分，在斯洛文尼亚卢布尔雅那和葡萄牙里斯本设有席位。其运作独立但与UPC机构紧密合作。PMAC旨在促进涉及UPC管辖权范围内的专利纠纷的替代性争议解决（ADR），包括具有事实、法律或商业联系的“相关纠纷”。当事人可选择单独或与UPC诉讼并行进行ADR程序。
report_items.summary_en: The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC), operating independently within the Unified Patent Court (UPC) framework, facilitates alternative dispute resolution for patent matters. With seats in Ljubljana and Lisbon, PMAC handles proceedings separately or in parallel with UPC litigation. Its jurisdiction extends to disputes involving European patents, unitary patents, and supplementary protection certificates, as well as related IP or commercial disputes sharing a factual, legal, or commercial nexus with UPC-competent cases. This structure allows parties to address broader portfolio iss...
core_points_zh: PMAC是UPC组成部分，设在斯洛文尼亚和葡萄牙，运作独立但与UPC机构紧密合作
ADR程序可单独进行或与UPC诉讼并行，适用于UPC拥有部分管辖权的专利及相关纠纷
“相关纠纷”涵盖与欧洲专利或补充保护证书有事实、法律或商业联系的其他IP或商业争议
core_points_en: PMAC operates independently but cooperates closely with UPC bodies, offering mediation and arbitration services from its seats in Slovenia and Portugal.
ADR proceedings may be conducted separately or in parallel with UPC litigation, provided a connection exists to UPC jurisdiction.
Scope includes 'related disputes' involving other patents or IP rights that share a factual, legal, or commercial nexus with UPC-competent cases.
report_items.insight_zh: 实务中需关注PMAC规则对UPC诉讼策略的影响。当纠纷涉及未选择退出的欧洲专利或单元专利时，当事人可考虑利用PMAC进行并行或独立的ADR程序，以可能更高效地解决包含非UPC管辖专利在内的关联争议。
report_items.insight_en: For rights holders managing European portfolios, PMAC offers a structured avenue to resolve complex, multi-jurisdictional IP conflicts efficiently. The ability to handle related non-UPC disputes alongside UPC matters provides strategic flexibility in settlement negotiations. Legal teams should evaluate how integrating PMAC processes might streamline resolution for portfolios containing both opted-out and unitary pate...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性
Practice note/实务观察
What to monitor/后续观察
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Enables efficient resolution of mixed IP portfolios by addressing UPC-competent and related non-UPC disputes in a single forum.
Practice note: Parties can initiate PMAC proceedings independently or concurrently with UPC actions, allowing for flexible procedural strategies.
What to monitor: Developments in PMAC case law and procedural rules to assess effectiveness in resolving cross-border patent and commercial nexus disputes.

report_items.title: Simmons & Simmons litigator Priya Nagpal has joined Wiggin
report_items.summary_zh: 拥有九年经验的专利诉讼合伙人Priya Nagpal从Simmons & Simmons离职，加入英国竞争对手Wiggin。Wiggin是一家在伦敦、布鲁塞尔和切尔滕纳姆设有办公室的全服务律所，专注于媒体、科技及知识产权建议与诉讼，重点处理英国专利案件。
report_items.summary_en: Priya Nagpal, an experienced patent litigation partner, has joined UK firm Wiggin after nine years at Simmons & Simmons. Wiggin operates offices in London, Brussels, and Cheltenham, specializing in media, technology, and intellectual property advice and litigation. The firm focuses its patent practice on UK cases. According to the source, Wiggin currently has no presence or activity in the Unified Patent Court. This lateral move highlights ongoing personnel shifts within the UK patent litigation sector, bringing senior expertise to a firm with a distinct domestic focus rather than a pan-Europe...
core_points_zh: 专利诉讼合伙人Priya Nagpal从Simmons & Simmons加入Wigg…
Wiggin专注英国专利案件，目前在统一专利法院无业务布局
core_points_en: Partner Priya Nagpal moves to Wiggin after nine years at Simmons & Simmons.
Wiggin specializes in UK patent cases and currently has no UPC presence.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This appointment strengthens Wiggin’s UK patent litigation capabilities while maintaining its current absence from the Unified Patent Court. For rights holders, this distinction is relevant when selecting counsel for national versus unitary patent disputes. The move underscores the competitive landscape for senior talent in London. Parties with existing matters should verify continuity protocols. Observers may note h...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders should note Wiggin’s specialized UK focus and current lack of UPC activity when instructing counsel.
Practice note: Senior lateral hires signal firm capacity changes; verify team continuity for ongoing UK patent litigation matters.
What to monitor: Future developments in Wiggin’s approach to cross-border IP disputes given its stated domestic concentration.

weekly_report.headline_en: UPC Rules Solidify; EU AI Guidelines Drafted
weekly_report.executive_line: UPC确立英语听证与初步异议边界，提升诉讼可预测性；欧盟发布高风险AI指南草案，瑞士引入专利实审，欧洲IP制度进入精细化调整期。
weekly_report.summary_zh: 本周欧洲IP焦点集中于制度完善与新兴技术合规。UPC上诉庭裁定允许英语口头听证，并明确初步异议仅限管辖权等程序事项，显著提升诉讼效率与确定性。欧盟委员会发布《人工智能法案》高风险系统分类指南草案，为合规提供框架。此外，瑞士专利法改革引入实质审查，EUIPO在名人商标及公序良俗裁定中展现灵活解释倾向，显示欧洲IP体系正加速适应技术与市场变化。

report_items.title_zh: 智能球门、护腿板及捡球机器人：DPMA更新足球技术画廊
report_items.title_en: DPMA Expands Football and Technology Gallery for 2026 World Cup
report_items.title: Smarte Tore, intelligente Schienbeinschoner und Roboter, die Bälle sammeln
report_items.summary_zh: 德国专利商标局（DPMA）借2026年美加墨世界杯之机，扩展其“足球与技术”在线画廊。该画廊收录了全球范围内过去125年间与足球相关的专利文献，涵盖门线技术、视频助理裁判、生物数据监测传感器及AI驱动设备等创新。DPMA旨在通过展示这些发明，强调知识产权保护在挖掘足球领域经济潜力中的重要作用。
report_items.summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) has expanded its online gallery, Football and Technology, to coincide with the 2026 FIFA World Cup in Canada, Mexico, and the USA. The updated collection features patent documents spanning 125 years of innovation, ranging from early mechanical equipment like screw-in studs to modern digital solutions. New additions include AI-controlled safety nets, ball-collecting robots, smart goals, and intelligent shin guards. The gallery also details established technologies such as goal-line technology and video assistant refereeing. DPMA President Eva Schew...
core_points_zh: DPMA为配合2026年世界杯，更新了展示全球足球相关专利的在线画廊
展出内容涵盖从传统机械装备到AI、机器人及生物数据监测等现代技术创新
DPMA主席指出，该画廊证实专利保护是利用足球发明经济潜力的重要工具
core_points_en: DPMA updates its online gallery with recent patents including AI-driven safety nets and robotics.
The collection covers 125 years of football innovations, from mechanical gear to digital tech.
The initiative highlights the role of IP protection in maximizing the economic value of sports inventions.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，德国后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This update serves primarily as a public awareness initiative rather than a legal precedent. For rights holders, it underscores the DPMA’s view of IP as a key driver for commercializing sports technology. Practitioners may find value in reviewing how the office categorizes emerging fields like wearable sensors and AI-assisted officiating within historical patent contexts.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Demonstrates the DPMA's strategic emphasis on IP as a tool for commercializing sports-related innovations and protecting R&D investments.
Practice note: The gallery offers a structured view of how mechanical and digital football technologies are documented, aiding prior art searches in sports equipment sectors.
What to monitor: Observe if future updates include detailed case studies on the patentability boundaries of AI-driven officiating or real-time biometric data processing.

report_items.title_en: Procedural Guide to Filing Oppositions at the European Patent Office
report_items.title: How To File An Opposition At The European Patent Office (EPO)
report_items.summary_zh: 本文介绍向欧洲专利局提起专利异议的程序。异议须书面或电子提交并缴费，仅限依据《欧洲专利公约》第100条规定的理由，包括缺乏可专利性、公开不充分及新增主题。明确排除清晰度、单一性等非独立异议理由。
report_items.summary_en: This guidance outlines the procedural requirements for filing oppositions against granted European patents at the EPO. Opponents must submit a notice in writing or electronically via Online Filing 2.0, ensuring the official fee is paid simultaneously. Challenges are strictly limited to grounds under Article 100 EPC: lack of patentability, insufficient disclosure, or added subject matter. The text clarifies that exclusions such as mathematical methods or medical treatments fall under patentability checks. It emphasizes that each ground must be clearly identified during filing, reinforcing that...
core_points_zh: 异议须向欧洲专利局书面或电子提交，并在提交时缴纳官方费用
异议理由限于公约第100条：缺乏可专利性、公开不充分或新增主题
清晰度、单一性或优先权无效等问题不得作为独立异议理由提出
core_points_en: Opposition notices must be filed in writing or electronically with the official fee paid at submission.
Valid challenges are restricted to Article 100 EPC grounds: patentability, disclosure sufficiency, or added matter.
Patentability grounds include lack of novelty, inventive step, or excluded subject matter like medical methods.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This overview reinforces the strict statutory limits of EPO opposition proceedings. Practitioners must ensure arguments align exclusively with Article 100 EPC grounds, avoiding inadmissible issues like clarity. Proper fee payment and clear ground identification are critical procedural steps to maintain admissibility and effectively challenge patent validity in Europe.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Understanding the narrow scope of allowable opposition grounds helps rights holders assess the viability of challenging competitor patents.
Practice note: Ensure opposition fees are paid upon filing and that arguments strictly adhere to Article 100 EPC to avoid inadmissibility.
What to monitor: Track EPO updates to Online Filing 2.0 and any evolving case law interpreting Article 100 grounds for sufficient disclosure.

report_items.title_zh: EUIPO大上诉委员会拒绝注册“GEORGE ORWELL”商标
report_items.title_en: EUIPO Grand Board Refuses GEORGE ORWELL Trademark for Content-Related Goods
report_items.title: The Price Of Literary Fame – EUIPO Grand Board Refuses Registration Of “GEORGE ORWELL” As A Trademark
report_items.summary_zh: 2025年12月19日，EUIPO大上诉委员会裁定，“GEORGE ORWELL”文字商标不得在书籍、电影及相关娱乐教育服务上注册为欧盟商标。委员会认定，相关公众会将该名称视为描述商品内容或主题，而非商业来源指示，因此依据《欧盟商标条例》第7(1)(c)条以缺乏显著性/具有描述性为由驳回申请。
report_items.summary_en: The EUIPO Grand Board of Appeal refused registration of the word mark GEORGE ORWELL for books, films, and educational services. In decision R 2248/2019-G, the Board ruled that the relevant public perceives the name as describing the subject matter or content of the goods, rather than indicating commercial origin. Consequently, the mark was rejected under Article 7(1)(c) of the EU Trade Mark Regulation for lack of distinctiveness due to descriptiveness. This ruling clarifies that famous persons’ names may be deemed descriptive when applied to content-oriented products, establishing that such si...
core_points_zh: EUIPO大上诉委员会拒绝“GEORGE ORWELL”在书籍及娱乐服务上的欧盟商标注册
裁定认定名人姓名可被公众视为描述商品内容或主题，而非商业来源指示
确认“内容/主题”属于欧盟商标条例第7(1)(c)条下描述性的认可子类别
core_points_en: Grand Board confirms subject matter is a recognized subcategory of descriptiveness under Article 7(1)(c).
Famous names describing content rather than origin are unregistrable for books and media.
Decision resolves diverging Office practices regarding registrability of well-known persons’ names.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案澄清了名人姓名在内容导向型商品上的可注册性标准。若姓名被公众感知为描述内容而非来源，将因描述性被驳回。企业在申请含名人姓名的商标时，需评估其在特定类别中是否仅起内容指示作用，避免触犯绝对驳回理由。
report_items.insight_en: This decision establishes that famous names used on content-driven goods may be refused as descriptive. Rights holders should anticipate higher scrutiny for personal names in publishing and entertainment classes. Applicants must demonstrate that the sign functions primarily as a brand identifier, not merely as a topic indicator, to overcome absolute grounds for refusal in these sectors.
insight_points_zh: 名人姓名在书籍、影音等内容类产品上易被认定为描述性标志
需区分姓名作为来源标识与作为内容主题指示的不同法律后果
后续应关注EUIPO对其他类似名人姓名商标申请的审查尺度一致性
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Names of famous figures face heightened refusal risks for books, films, and educational services where the name signals content topic.
Practice note: Evidence must prove the mark indicates commercial origin, countering the presumption that the name describes the work’s subject matter.
What to monitor: Future EUIPO examinations of other historical or literary figures’ names for similar content-oriented goods and services.

report_items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭准许口头听证使用英语的裁定
report_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Permits English Oral Pleadings Despite French Language of Proceedings
report_items.title: CoA, May 15, 2026, Order On Request For Use Of English At Oral Hearing, UPC-CoA-50/2026
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭在Robert Bosch诉Valeo案中作出裁定，尽管法语为案件程序语言，但鉴于上诉人代表法语口语能力不足且被上诉人同意，法院基于程序效率与公平原则，准许双方在2026年5月26日的口头听证中使用英语进行辩论。法院引用先例及程序规则前言作为法律依据，强调灵活性与成本效益，未正式变更案件语言。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal authorized oral pleadings in English for a hearing where French remained the formal language of proceedings. The decision addressed an appellant’s representative who understood French but lacked sufficient oral proficiency for effective advocacy. The court prioritized procedural efficiency and fairness, noting that direct English advocacy was superior to using an interpreter. Crucially, the respondent consented to the request, which strengthened the application. The court relied on the Rules of Procedure Preamble’s principles of flexibility and cost-effectiveness, citin...
core_points_zh: 法院基于程序规则前言的灵活性原则，准许在非程序语言的口头听证中使用英语
被上诉人的同意显著增强了变更听证语言的请求效力，使附属请求变得不必要
法院参考了涉及相同当事人的先前程序裁定，将其作为支持当前决定的说服性先例
core_points_en: The Court permitted English oral pleadings while retaining French as the formal language of proceedings based on pragmatic efficiency considerations.
Respondent consent to the language request significantly strengthened the application, rendering subsidiary requests for partial English use unnecessary.
The Court cited the Rules of Procedure Preamble and prior orders involving the same parties as the legal basis for this flexible approach.
report_items.insight_zh: 该裁定确立了UPC上诉庭在特定条件下允许庭审语言与程序语言分离的实务操作。当事人可通过证明语言障碍、获得对方同意并援引效率原则，申请使用更熟练的语言进行口头辩论。这为跨国诉讼中的语言策略提供了灵活性，同时强调了双方合意对程序决定的关键影响。
report_items.insight_en: This order highlights the UPC’s willingness to decouple the language of oral hearings from the formal language of proceedings to ensure effective representation. It demonstrates that party consensus on procedural logistics can drive judicial discretion, particularly when supported by principles of efficiency. Practitioners should note that prior procedural history between identical parties may influence subsequent ca...
insight_points_zh: 程序语言与庭审口语可分离，需证明语言能力不足及对方同意
程序规则前言中的效率与公平原则是法院行使裁量权的主要依据
相同当事人间的先前程序裁定可作为后续程序决定的重要参考因素
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Parties facing language proficiency gaps can seek oral hearing adjustments without formally changing the case language, provided opposing counsel consents.
Practice note: Citing the Rules of Procedure Preamble on efficiency and referencing prior procedural orders between the same parties strengthens requests for flexible hearing arra…
What to monitor: Whether the Court of Appeal continues to treat party alignment on procedural matters as a decisive factor in granting language accommodations.

report_items.title_zh: 统一专利法院初步异议：管辖权与实体问题的明确界限
report_items.title_en: UPC Preliminary Objections: Strict Boundary Between Jurisdiction and Substance
report_items.title: Preliminary Objections Before The UPC: A Clear Boundary Between Jurisdiction And Substance
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析统一专利法院在REEL International诉Fives ECL案中的裁定。法院依据《程序规则》第19.1条，驳回被告基于诉讼利益和德国判决既判力提出的初步异议。法院明确初步异议仅限管辖权、分庭管辖权及语言三类情形，其他实体争议应合并审理以符合程序经济原则。
report_items.summary_en: In a dispute between REEL International and Fives ECL, the Unified Patent Court rejected a defendant’s preliminary objection based on lack of interest to sue and res judicata from German proceedings. Relying on Rule 19.1 of the Rules of Procedure, the Court clarified that preliminary objections are strictly limited to challenges regarding court jurisdiction, division competence, or language of proceedings. The Court held that issues such as standing and res judicata require substantive examination of facts and evidence, rather than serving as procedural filters. This decision reinforces a clea...
core_points_zh: UPC程序规则限定初步异议仅适用于管辖权、分庭管辖权及诉讼语言三类情形
诉讼利益及既判力抗辩不属初步异议范围，需结合事实证据进行实体审查
法院拒绝分离审理或中间命令请求，主张单次听证以提升效率并实现一年内结案
core_points_en: Rule 19.1 limits preliminary objections exclusively to jurisdiction, division competence, and language issues.
Claims regarding interest to sue and res judicata fall outside the scope of preliminary objections.
Substantive defenses require full factual examination and cannot be resolved via procedural dismissal.
report_items.insight_zh: UPC通过严格界定初步异议范围，防止程序碎片化，强调诉讼经济与快速裁决。当事人需注意管辖权异议与实体抗辩的程序分流，避免试图通过初步异议拖延实体审理。此裁判思路有助于确立UPC高效审理的司法惯例。
report_items.insight_en: This ruling confirms the UPC’s commitment to procedural efficiency by preventing the fragmentation of cases through broad preliminary objections. Practitioners should note that defenses like res judicata will be addressed during merits proceedings, not as threshold jurisdictional bars. This approach reduces delays but requires parties to prepare comprehensive factual arguments early in the litigation process.
insight_points_zh: 明确初步异议的封闭列表性质，排除诉讼利益等实体前置抗辩
确立合并审理原则，拒绝将既判力等问题从实体审理中剥离
观察UPC后续案件是否持续贯彻这一效率优先的程序管理逻辑
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Expect faster initial jurisdictional rulings, but anticipate that substantive defenses like res judicata will proceed to full trial rather than causing early dis…
Practice note: Do not rely on Rule 19.1 for non-jurisdictional defenses; prepare detailed factual evidence for merits hearings instead of seeking procedural shortcuts.
What to monitor: Future UPC case law to confirm if this strict interpretation of Rule 19.1 remains consistent across different divisions and fact patterns.

report_items.summary_en: The emergence of CRISPR-Cas9 technology has triggered one of the most complex patent disputes in recent history. Initial filings by multiple groups between 2012 and 2013 resulted in overlapping claims, leading to prolonged legal conflicts over rights. Two primary rival camps have dominated this landscape. This analysis reviews the current status of these European patent battles and outlines potential future developments for stakeholders monitoring this high-stakes biotechnology sector.
core_points_zh: CRISPR/Cas9技术引发近年最复杂的专利纠纷之一
年多方申请导致权利要求重叠及长期法律争端
争端中形成了两个主要的对立竞争阵营
core_points_en: CRISPR-Cas9 discovery sparked complex patent battles due to overlapping filings from 2012 to 2013.
Two principal rival camps emerged as key competitors in the struggle for patent rights.
Years of legal wrangling have defined the current European landscape for this biotechnology platform.
report_items.insight_zh: 鉴于原文仅为导语片段，缺乏具体案件进展、法院裁决或欧洲专利局审查动态等实质内容。目前仅能确认该技术在欧洲存在长期的权属争议背景，需等待全文发布以获取关于“当前状况”及“未来走向”的具体法律分析或实务建议。
report_items.insight_en: Given the limited source text, specific legal outcomes or procedural updates are not detailed. However, the historical context of overlapping claims remains critical for rights holders. Stakeholders should recognize that the European patent environment for CRISPR-Cas9 is still shaped by these foundational disputes. Monitoring the resolution of conflicts between the two main rival camps is essential for understanding...
insight_points_zh: 原文未提供具体的专利有效性或侵权判定结论
需关注后续全文是否披露欧洲专利局或法院的最新动态
目前仅能确认存在两大竞争阵营的历史背景事实
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders must account for the legacy of overlapping 2012-2013 filings when assessing portfolio strength in Europe.
Practice note: The existence of two dominant rival camps suggests continued complexity in interpreting claim scope and validity.
What to monitor: Future publications should be tracked for specific updates on European Patent Office decisions or court rulings affecting these rival groups.

report_items.summary_zh: 本文指南探讨通过调解解决知识产权争议的优势，包括比诉讼更快速、廉价且保密。重点介绍欧盟层面的新机制：欧盟知识产权局调解中心服务范围已扩大至所有欧盟商标和设计异议程序；统一专利法院专利调解与仲裁中心将于2026年6月启动。此外引用WIPO数据，显示中小企业在IP调解案件中占比显著。
report_items.summary_en: Mediation offers faster, confidential, and commercially focused resolutions for intellectual property disputes compared to litigation. The World Intellectual Property Organization Arbitration and Mediation Center reported a forty-two percent case increase in 2025, with small and medium-sized enterprises comprising fifty-nine percent of parties. In the European Union, the EUIPO Mediation Centre expanded its services in June 2025 to cover all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and designs. Furthermore, the Unified Patent Court’s Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre is scheduled to ina...
core_points_zh: EUIPO调解中心服务于2025年6月扩展，覆盖所有欧盟商标和注册设计的双方程序
统一专利法院专利调解与仲裁中心定于2026年6月成立，提供欧洲替代性争议解决论坛
WIPO数据显示2025年案件量增42%，其中中小企业和个人当事人占比达59%
core_points_en: WIPO AMC cases rose forty-two percent in 2025, with SMEs and individuals accounting for fifty-nine percent of involved parties.
EUIPO Mediation Centre services expanded in June 2025 to include all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and registered designs.
The Unified Patent Court Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre will launch in June 2026 as a new European ADR forum.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: The expansion of institutional mediation frameworks at EUIPO and the upcoming UPC center signals a strategic shift toward non-adversarial dispute resolution in Europe. Rights holders should evaluate these mechanisms for cross-border conflicts where confidentiality and preserving commercial relationships are prioritized over public judicial precedents. The high participation of SMEs in WIPO cases suggests mediation is...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Mediation provides confidential, commercially oriented solutions for multi-jurisdictional IP disputes, particularly valuable for SMEs and entities seeking to pre…
Practice note: Counsel should assess the expanded EUIPO mediation scope for trademark and design oppositions, and prepare for the UPC Center's June 2026 launch for patent-related…
What to monitor: Track procedural rules and adoption rates of the new UPC Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre following its inauguration in June 2026.

report_items.title_zh: EPO成功完成ISO监督审核
report_items.title_en: EPO Maintains ISO Certifications Following Successful Surveillance Audit
report_items.title: EPO successfully completes ISO surveillance audit
report_items.summary_zh: 2026年4月，欧洲专利局（EPO）顺利通过外部审计机构的管理体系ISO监督审核。此次审核确认了EPO在质量管理、职业健康安全、信息安全和环境管理方面的稳健性，维持了其ISO 9001、ISO 45001、ISO 27001及ISO 14001认证。这体现了EPO对国际标准及合规性的承诺，并通过综合管理体系支持高质量服务交付。
report_items.summary_en: In April 2026, the European Patent Office (EPO) successfully completed its periodic ISO surveillance audit conducted by external auditors. The review confirmed the continued robustness and maturity of the EPO’s integrated management systems, allowing the organization to maintain its certifications for quality management (ISO 9001), occupational health and safety (ISO 45001), information security (ISO 27001), and environmental management (ISO 14001). This outcome underscores the EPO’s adherence to international standards and regulatory compliance. By aligning policies, processes, and controls w...
core_points_zh: EPO于2026年4月通过外部审计机构的ISO管理体系监督审核
维持ISO 9001、45001、27001及14001四项国际认证，确认体系成熟稳健
通过综合管理体系整合政策流程，确保持续改进及服务交付质量
core_points_en: The EPO passed its April 2026 external ISO surveillance audit, confirming ongoing adherence to international management standards.
Certifications maintained include ISO 9001 for quality, ISO 27001 for information security, ISO 45001 for safety, and ISO 14001 for environment.
The EPO utilizes an Integrated Management System to unify policies and controls, supporting service quality and continuous operational improvement.
report_items.insight_zh: 此新闻属于EPO内部行政与合规动态，不直接改变专利实体法或审查标准。实务中需关注其信息安全（ISO 27001）与质量管理（ISO 9001）的持续合规，这间接保障了电子提交系统及审查流程的稳定性与数据安全性，是评估EPO服务可靠性的基础指标。
report_items.insight_en: This update confirms the administrative and operational stability of the EPO rather than introducing changes to substantive patent law or examination guidelines. For rights holders and legal practitioners, the maintenance of ISO 27001 and ISO 9001 certifications serves as a key indicator of the reliability and data security standards underpinning the EPO’s electronic filing systems and procedural workflows. While thi...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性: EPO运营稳定性与数据安全合规性保障
Practice note/实务观察: 关注EPO管理体系认证状态对服务连续性的影响
What to monitor/后续观察: 无具体法律变动，仅需知悉机构合规状态更新
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Confirms the stability and data security compliance of EPO operations, indirectly supporting the reliability of electronic submission channels and case processin…
Practice note: Monitor the status of EPO management system certifications as baseline indicators for service continuity and operational maturity.
What to monitor: No immediate legal or procedural changes; treat as routine compliance confirmation regarding institutional operational standards.

report_items.title_zh: 欧盟资助IP合作扩展至西巴尔干地区
report_items.title_en: EUIPO Launches EU-Funded IP Cooperation Project in Western Balkans
report_items.title: EU-funded IP cooperation expands into the Western Balkans
report_items.summary_zh: 原文摘要显示，一项新的欧盟资助合作项目正在与扩大伙伴国开展，旨在支持这些国家在加入欧盟之前实现知识产权标准的对齐。该项目由欧盟知识产权局（EUIPO）发布，聚焦于通过合作促进法律与实践的协调，为未来的欧盟成员资格做准备。
report_items.summary_en: The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) has announced a new cooperation project funded by the European Union. This initiative targets enlargement partners in the Western Balkans, aiming to support the alignment of their intellectual property standards with those of the European Union. The project serves as a preparatory measure for these countries ahead of potential future EU accession.
core_points_zh: 标题显示欧盟资助的新合作项目已扩展至西巴尔干地区
原文摘要显示项目旨在支持伙伴国在入盟前对齐欧盟知识产权标准
core_points_en: A new EU-funded cooperation project targets enlargement partners in the Western Balkans region.
The initiative focuses on aligning local intellectual property standards with European Union frameworks.
The project supports regulatory harmonization efforts preceding potential EU accession.
report_items.insight_zh: Practice note / What to monitor：需持续观察该合作项目的具体实施范围、涵盖的知识产权领域（如商标、专利或外观设计）以及具体的时间表。鉴于正文信息有限，目前仅能确认其为入盟前的标准对齐举措，尚无法评估对特定行业权利人的直接影响。
report_items.insight_en: This development highlights ongoing regulatory convergence efforts between the EU and candidate countries. For rights holders operating across Europe, monitoring the implementation of these alignment measures is relevant for understanding future market entry conditions and enforcement landscapes in the Western Balkans. The focus remains on legislative and administrative harmonization rather than immediate procedural...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性
Practice note/实务观察
What to monitor/后续观察
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders should track regulatory alignment in the Western Balkans to anticipate future market integration and enforcement environments.
Practice note: The project emphasizes pre-accession standard alignment, indicating long-term legislative harmonization goals for IP systems in the region.
What to monitor: Specific timelines, covered IP sectors, and detailed implementation steps of the cooperation project remain to be defined.

report_items.title_zh: UPC替代性争议解决：仲裁、调解与专家裁决
report_items.title_en: UPC ADR Mechanisms: Scope of PMAC Arbitration, Mediation and Expert Determination
report_items.title: UPC ADR: Arbitration, Mediation And Expert Determination
report_items.summary_zh: 专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）作为统一专利法院（UPC）的一部分，在斯洛文尼亚卢布尔雅那和葡萄牙里斯本设有席位。其运作独立但与UPC机构紧密合作。PMAC旨在促进涉及UPC管辖权范围内的专利纠纷的替代性争议解决（ADR），包括具有事实、法律或商业联系的“相关纠纷”。当事人可选择单独或与UPC诉讼并行进行ADR程序。
report_items.summary_en: The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC), operating independently within the Unified Patent Court (UPC) framework, facilitates alternative dispute resolution for patent matters. With seats in Ljubljana and Lisbon, PMAC handles proceedings separately or in parallel with UPC litigation. Its jurisdiction extends to disputes involving European patents, unitary patents, and supplementary protection certificates, as well as related IP or commercial disputes sharing a factual, legal, or commercial nexus with UPC-competent cases. This structure allows parties to address broader portfolio iss...
core_points_zh: PMAC是UPC组成部分，设在斯洛文尼亚和葡萄牙，运作独立但与UPC机构紧密合作
ADR程序可单独进行或与UPC诉讼并行，适用于UPC拥有部分管辖权的专利及相关纠纷
“相关纠纷”涵盖与欧洲专利或补充保护证书有事实、法律或商业联系的其他IP或商业争议
core_points_en: PMAC operates independently but cooperates closely with UPC bodies, offering mediation and arbitration services from its seats in Slovenia and Portugal.
ADR proceedings may be conducted separately or in parallel with UPC litigation, provided a connection exists to UPC jurisdiction.
Scope includes 'related disputes' involving other patents or IP rights that share a factual, legal, or commercial nexus with UPC-competent cases.
report_items.insight_zh: 实务中需关注PMAC规则对UPC诉讼策略的影响。当纠纷涉及未选择退出的欧洲专利或单元专利时，当事人可考虑利用PMAC进行并行或独立的ADR程序，以可能更高效地解决包含非UPC管辖专利在内的关联争议。
report_items.insight_en: For rights holders managing European portfolios, PMAC offers a structured avenue to resolve complex, multi-jurisdictional IP conflicts efficiently. The ability to handle related non-UPC disputes alongside UPC matters provides strategic flexibility in settlement negotiations. Legal teams should evaluate how integrating PMAC processes might streamline resolution for portfolios containing both opted-out and unitary pate...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性
Practice note/实务观察
What to monitor/后续观察
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Enables efficient resolution of mixed IP portfolios by addressing UPC-competent and related non-UPC disputes in a single forum.
Practice note: Parties can initiate PMAC proceedings independently or concurrently with UPC actions, allowing for flexible procedural strategies.
What to monitor: Developments in PMAC case law and procedural rules to assess effectiveness in resolving cross-border patent and commercial nexus disputes.

daily_audio_latest.opening_line_zh: 今天是2026年5月26日。以下是今天欧洲 IP 圈最重要的几条变化。
daily_audio_latest.opening_line_en: Today is May 26, 2026. Here are the most relevant European IP developments in today's briefing.
daily_audio_latest.closing_line_zh: 总结来看，今天的欧洲 IP 动态仍然围绕专利、商标展开，接下来值得继续关注CRISPR-Cas9专利阵营在欧洲的最新诉讼动态。
daily_audio_latest.closing_line_en: Overall, today's European IP signals center on Patents, Trade marks, General IP. The next point to watch is Further court orders, institutional guidance and specialist commentary on the same issues.
transcript_lines_zh: 今天是2026年5月26日。以下是今天欧洲 IP 圈最重要的几条变化。
先看第一条，DPMA为配合2026年世界杯，更新了展示全球足球相关专利的在线画廊。后续要看德国会不会围绕这类官方动向继续给出配套安排或更明确口径。
再看第二条，异议须向欧洲专利局书面或电子提交，并在提交时缴纳官方费用。后续要看欧洲层面会不会围绕这类官方动向继续给出配套安排或更明确口径。
再看第三条，EUIPO大上诉委员会拒绝“GEORGE ORWELL”在书籍及娱乐服务上的欧盟商标注册。值得关注的是，名人姓名在书籍、影音等内容类产品上易被认定为描述性标志。
最后看第四条，法院基于程序规则前言的灵活性原则，准许在非程序语言的口头听证中使用英语。值得关注的是，程序语言与庭审口语可分离，需证明语言能力不足及对方同意。
总结来看，今天的欧洲 IP 动态仍然围绕专利、商标展开，接下来值得继续关注CRISPR-Cas9专利阵营在欧洲的最新诉讼动态。
transcript_lines_en: Today is May 26, 2026. Here are the most relevant European IP developments in today's briefing.

First, DPMA updates its online gallery with recent patents including AI-driven safety nets and robotics. Why it matters: Demonstrates the DPMA's strategic emphasis on IP as a tool for commercializing sports-related innovations and protecting R&D investment.

Next, Opposition notices must be filed in writing or electronically with the official fee paid at submission. Why it matters: Understanding the narrow scope of allowable opposition grounds helps rights holders assess the viability of challenging competitor pate.

Next, Grand Board confirms subject matter is a recognized subcategory of descriptiveness under Article 7(1)(c). Why it matters: Names of famous figures face heightened refusal risks for books, films, and educational services where the name signals content topic.

Finally, The Court permitted English oral pleadings while retaining French as the formal language of proceedings based on pragmat. Why it matters: Parties facing language proficiency gaps can seek oral hearing adjustments without formally changing the case language, provided opposi.
Overall, today's European IP signals center on Patents, Trade marks, General IP. The next point to watch is Further court orders, institutional guidance and specialist commentary on the same issues.

daily_audio_latest.transcript_en:
Today is May 26, 2026. Here are the most relevant European IP developments in today's briefing.
First, DPMA updates its online gallery with recent patents including AI-driven safety nets and robotics. Why it matters: Demonstrates the DPMA's strategic emphasis on IP as a tool for commercializing sports-related innovations and protecting R&D investment.
Next, Opposition notices must be filed in writing or electronically with the official fee paid at submission. Why it matters: Understanding the narrow scope of allowable opposition grounds helps rights holders assess the viability of challenging competitor pate.
Next, Grand Board confirms subject matter is a recognized subcategory of descriptiveness under Article 7(1)(c). Why it matters: Names of famous figures face heightened refusal risks for books, films, and educational services where the name signals content topic.
Finally, The Court permitted English oral pleadings while retaining French as the formal language of proceedings based on pragmat. Why it matters: Parties facing language proficiency gaps can seek oral hearing adjustments without formally changing the case language, provided opposi.
Overall, today's European IP signals center on Patents, Trade marks, General IP. The next point to watch is Further court orders, institutional guidance and specialist commentary on the same issues.

topics.headline_zh: UPC程序灵活化与证据严管
topics.headline_en: UPC Enhances Procedural Flexibility While Tightening Evidence and Claim Standards
topics.summary_zh: UPC上诉庭准许英语口头听证，提升程序灵活性；但实体审理中严格限制迟交证据及补充专家意见。杜塞尔多夫增设合议庭缓解积压，PMAC调解系统上线提供ADR新选项。SEP判决强调许可意愿表达，权利要求解释趋严。
key_points: 程序语言灵活：上诉庭基于效率原则，在对方同意下准许非程序语言（如英语）进行口头听证。
证据规则严苛：严格执行前置披露，迟交实物证据或缺乏来源证明将被排除；保全后不得单方补充专家意见。
SEP抗辩关键：实施者未明确表达许可意愿前，法院无需审查专利权人报价是否符合FRAND原则。
actions: 优化应诉策略：利用英语听证降低翻译成本，但须确保早期完整提交证据链，避免迟交被拒。
调整权利要求：警惕功能性限定被狭义解读，出口组件需评估直接侵权风险，保持授权与诉讼策略一致。
善用ADR机制：通过新上线的PMAC系统进行调解或仲裁，以降低在欧维权成本并缩短争议解决周期。
watchlist: 主要分院判例趋势：关注杜塞尔多夫等核心分院早期判例对等同原则及权利要求解释的固化影响。
单一专利地域局限：核查申请日各国公约状态，避免因部分成员国未加入而导致单一效力失效。
费用裁定细节：注意权利放弃需明示，自行聘请翻译费用不可转嫁，需精细化预算诉讼成本。
topics.summary_en: The Unified Patent Court is balancing procedural efficiency with stricter substantive controls. The Court of Appeal now permits oral pleadings in non-proceeding languages, such as English, to enhance advocacy effectiveness when opposing counsel consents. Conversely, local divisions are enforcing rigorous evidence rules, excluding late physical submissions and denying supplementary expert opinions following ex-parte inspections. The Düsseldorf Local Division has expanded capacity with a second panel to address caseload growth, while the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) has launched its digital case management system for alternative dispute resolution. Recent judgments emphasize that standard-essential patent implementers must clearly express licensing willingness before FRAND compliance is reviewed. Furthermore, courts are applying narrow claim constructions guided by prosec...
key_points_en: Procedural language flexibility: The Court of Appeal allows oral hearings in English despite French proceedings, prioritizing efficiency and fairness with opposing party consent.
Strict evidence admissibility: Late physical evidence lacking provenance is excluded, and parties cannot submit supplementary expert reports immediately after ex-parte preservation...
SEP licensing prerequisites: Courts will not assess whether a patent holder's offer meets FRAND terms unless the implementer has explicitly expressed willingness to obtain a licens...
actions_en: Optimize litigation strategy: Leverage English oral hearings to reduce translation costs but ensure complete early disclosure of evidence chains to avoid exclusion for lateness.
Refine claim drafting: Anticipate narrow interpretations of functional limitations and prosecution history estoppel; assess direct infringement risks for standalone components expo...
Utilize ADR mechanisms: Engage the newly operational PMAC digital platform for mediation or arbitration to potentially lower costs and accelerate resolution of cross-border dispute...
watchlist_en: Jurisprudential consistency: Monitor how concentrated caseloads in divisions like Düsseldorf and The Hague solidify early precedents on equivalence and claim interpretation.
Unitary Patent validity: Verify the ratification status of member states at the time of filing to prevent partial failure of unitary effect due to non-participation.
Cost recovery rules: Note that waiving rights requires explicit declaration and that independently hired interpreter fees are generally non-recoverable under current cost decisions...

topics.headline_zh: 欧SEP司法碎片化与许可新范式
topics.headline_en: European SEP Landscape Shifts Amid UPC Rise and Global Rate Conflicts
topics.summary_zh: 2026年欧洲SEP格局剧变：UPC崛起打破德国传统，英法院确立全球费率裁定权但中英判决现冲突。诺基亚、华为等巨头在车联网与流媒体领域激烈博弈，禁诉令频发。仲裁成为FRAND争议新出口，Avanci专利池加速覆盖中国车企。企业需应对多法域诉讼风险及反垄断合规新规。
key_points: 司法管辖重构：UPC积极介入FRAND费率裁定并签发反反诉禁令，英国高院确立全球费率裁判权，导致中英判决冲突及管辖权争夺加剧。
程序策略转向：英国上诉法院在Acer诉诺基亚案中认可含仲裁条款的要约，推动FRAND争议从诉讼向仲裁转移；NPE利用UPC发起战略诉讼。
行业许可扩张：Avanci专利池加速吸纳中国车企及商用车客户，Wi-Fi 7等新标准引发新一轮专利池整合与诉讼，许可费合规面临TTBER新规挑战。
actions: 建立中英欧多法域应诉协同机制，针对UPC及英国法院的全球费率裁定提前准备可比协议证据，防范禁诉令风险。
审查现有SEP许可协议是否符合2026年生效的修订版TTBER反垄断指南，优化专利池参与策略以规避合规隐患。
在收到侵权通知后立即书面表达FRAND许可意愿以保留抗辩权，并评估将争议提交仲裁以降低诉讼不确定性的可行性。
watchlist: 英国最高法院关于专利池FRAND义务及特斯拉5G案的最终裁决风向
UPC上诉法院对全球FRAND费率管辖权及反反诉禁令的后续判例演进
欧盟委员会针对SEP许可透明度及必要性评估的监管框架改革细则

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.summary_en: The European standard-essential patent landscape is undergoing significant transformation in 2026, driven by the Unified Patent Court’s expanding role and conflicting global rate determinations. The UPC is actively issuing anti-anti-suit injunctions and asserting jurisdiction, challenging traditional German precedents and creating friction with Chinese interim licenses. Simultaneously, UK courts are establishing global FRAND rates, leading to jurisdictional clashes. Procedural strategies are shifting toward arbitration, as seen in recent appellate decisions, while non-practicing entities leverage the UPC for strategic litigation. In the automotive and connectivity sectors, patent pools like Avanci are expanding coverage, prompting heightened antitrust scrutiny under new EU regulations and divergent US enforcement approaches. Companies must navigate these multi-jurisdictional risks, ensur...
key_points_en: Jurisdictional fragmentation intensifies as the UPC asserts authority via anti-anti-suit injunctions, conflicting with UK global rate rulings and Chinese interim licenses.
Procedural dynamics shift toward arbitration and stricter FRAND defense protocols, with UPC courts limiting external-eyes-only regimes and emphasizing early willingness to license.
Automotive and IoT licensing faces transatlantic antitrust divergence, with EU patent pool expansion contrasting against US DOJ scrutiny of collective negotiation groups.
actions_en: Coordinate multi-jurisdictional defense strategies to manage conflicting global rate rulings and mitigate anti-anti-suit injunction risks in UPC and UK proceedings.
Audit SEP licensing practices against the revised TTBER guidelines and ensure clear separation of US and EU negotiation activities to address antitrust divergence.
Document immediate FRAND willingness upon receiving infringement notices and evaluate arbitration clauses to reduce litigation uncertainty and preserve defensive rights.
watchlist_en: UPC Court of Appeal precedents on global FRAND jurisdiction and the enforcement of anti-anti-suit injunctions against foreign proceedings.
UK Supreme Court rulings on patent pool FRAND obligations and final determinations in high-profile 5G automotive disputes.
EU and UK regulatory reforms regarding SEP transparency, essentiality checks, and the implementation of new antitrust compliance frameworks.

topics.headline_zh: EUIPO商标确权新规与融资机遇
topics.headline_en: EUIPO Trademark Validity Rulings, Craft GIs, and IP Finance
topics.summary_zh: 本季度EUIPO明确异议程序中在先权利须在裁决时持续有效，纯英国权利失效；名人姓名在内容类产品上易被拒。同时，手工艺地理标志框架落地，EUIPO联手EIF推出IP融资支持。企业需警惕恶意抢注风险，利用中小企业基金降低成本，并关注新型IP资产化机会。
key_points: CJEU裁定异议依据的在先权利必须在EUIPO最终决定时仍有效，纯英国法权利过渡期后无法阻碍欧盟商标注册。
大上诉委员会拒绝“GEORGE ORWELL”注册，认定名人姓名在书籍娱乐领域主要指示内容主题而非商业来源。
欧盟手工艺地理标志（CIGI）正式实施，利摩日瓷器获首单注册；EUIPO与EIF合作解锁知识产权支持型融资。
actions: 复核对欧异议策略，确保引证商标在审查全程有效，避免依赖已失效或仅限英国的未注册商标权利。
内容类品牌申请欧盟商标时，规避直接使用名人姓名或描述性词汇，强化显著性设计以防被认定为描述性标志。
符合条件的中小企业积极申请EUIPO 2026基金补贴以降低注册成本，并探索利用新IP融资机制盘活无形资产。
watchlist: 德国及欧盟范围内利用AI进行的恶意商标抢注趋势及DPMA/EUIPO的打击口径变化。
欧盟手工艺和工业地理标志（CIGI）后续配套细则及对中国传统工艺品出海的潜在保护路径。
EUIPO调解中心服务扩展后的实际案例效果，以及统一专利法院仲裁中心成立后的争议解决新动态。
topics.summary_en: Recent developments at the EUIPO clarify critical standards for trademark validity and introduce new asset monetization pathways. The CJEU ruled that earlier rights relied upon in oppositions must remain valid at the time of the final decision, rendering pure UK rights ineffective post-transition. Additionally, the Grand Board refused the GEORGE ORWELL mark, establishing that celebrity names often describe content rather than commercial origin in media sectors. On the regulatory front, the EU framework for craft and industrial geographical indications is now operational, with initial registrations secured. Concurrently, the EUIPO has partnered with the European Investment Fund to facilitate IP-backed financing. These shifts require rights holders to reassess opposition strategies, refine branding for content-related goods, and explore emerging funding mechanisms.
key_points_en: CJEU confirms earlier rights must be valid at the time of the EUIPO decision, barring reliance on lapsed or purely UK-based rights.
Grand Board rules celebrity names like GEORGE ORWELL are descriptive of content subject matter, not indicators of commercial origin for media goods.
EU craft geographical indications framework enters force while EUIPO and EIF launch initiatives to unlock IP-backed financing for innovative firms.
actions_en: Audit opposition strategies to ensure cited earlier rights remain legally effective in the EU throughout the entire examination and appeal process.
Avoid using celebrity names or descriptive terms for content-related brands; strengthen distinctiveness to counter refusals based on subject matter descriptiveness.
Leverage the 2026 SME Fund for cost reimbursement and evaluate new IP-backed finance structures to capitalize on intangible asset portfolios.
watchlist_en: Enforcement trends regarding AI-driven bad faith filings and evolving responses from the EUIPO and national offices like the DPMA.
Implementation details for the craft and industrial geographical indications system and its potential impact on traditional product protection strategies.
Operational outcomes of the expanded EUIPO Mediation Centre and the upcoming launch of the Unified Patent Court Arbitration Centre in June 2026.

topics.headline_zh: 英欧强化假冒执法与资金保障
topics.headline_en: UK and EU Strengthen Counterfeit Enforcement and Funding Through 2029
topics.summary_zh: 英国确认IP犯罪部门资金延至2029年并拟扩编，欧盟依托EMPACT框架深化跨机构协作打击有组织犯罪。英欧同步升级针对不安全假冒产品的执法力度，强调供应链溯源与公众沟通。中企需警惕合规风险，完善防伪体系以应对日益严格的欧洲市场监管与刑事追责趋势。
key_points: 英国UKIPO获政府持续资助至2029年，计划扩充IP犯罪专项执法部门规模
欧盟EUIPO通过EMPACT框架加强跨机构协作，重点打击关联有组织犯罪的IP侵权
官方警示假冒产品危害，强调建立合规溯源体系及加强供应商尽职调查的重要性
actions: 全面审查对欧出口产品的供应链溯源机制，确保来源合法可查
升级产品防伪技术标识，配合欧洲海关及执法机构的查验要求
加强对欧洲分销商及采购商的背景尽调，规避连带法律责任风险
watchlist: 英国IP犯罪部门扩编的具体时间表及新增职能范围公告
EMPACT框架下针对特定行业或品类的跨境联合执法行动动态
2029年前英国专项执法资金投入力度及实际案件查处数据变化
topics.topic_name_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护
topics.summary_en: The United Kingdom has confirmed continued government funding for its specialist Intellectual Property Crime Unit until 2029, with plans to expand operational capacity. Concurrently, the European Union Intellectual Property Office is deepening cross-agency collaboration under the EMPACT framework to combat organized crime linked to intellectual property infringement. Both jurisdictions are intensifying enforcement against unsafe counterfeit products, emphasizing supply chain traceability and public awareness. Rights holders must adapt to stricter regulatory scrutiny and criminal liability trends in European markets. Companies are advised to enhance anti-counterfeiting measures, conduct rigorous supplier due diligence, and ensure robust sourcing verification. These developments signal a sustained commitment by UK and EU authorities to dismantle criminal networks and protect brand integrit...
key_points_en: UK government extends funding for the IP Crime Unit until 2029 and considers expanding its enforcement capabilities.
EUIPO leverages the EMPACT framework to enhance cross-border cooperation against IP crimes linked to organized criminal groups.
Authorities emphasize the critical need for compliant supply chain traceability and rigorous supplier due diligence to mitigate risks.
actions_en: Audit supply chain traceability mechanisms for exports to Europe to ensure legal sourcing and verifiable provenance.
Upgrade product anti-counterfeiting technologies to align with enhanced inspection protocols by European customs and enforcement agencies.
Conduct thorough background checks on European distributors and purchasers to avoid potential joint liability for IP infringements.
watchlist_en: Announcements regarding the specific timeline and expanded functional scope of the UK IP Crime Unit.
Cross-border joint enforcement operations targeting specific industries or product categories under the EMPACT framework.
Trends in actual case investigations and enforcement data reflecting the impact of UK funding through 2029.
